title: ceratostylis lateralis
intro: Ceratostylis lateralis, also known as the 'slender orchid', is a species of orchid native to tropical regions of Asia. Traditionally, this plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Ceratostylis lateralis are said to include the treatment of fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as providing antioxidant and immune-boosting effects. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, with some regions also using it in traditional medicine to treat various ailments.
